commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `appServer.codeModeOnly` for the Codex plugin, wires it into app-server thread start/resume and side-thread config, and adds docs, manifest metadata, unit coverage, and live harness coverage for opt-in code-mode-only dynamic tool calls.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR rather than a standalone bug report. The linked regression is already fixed on current main by disabling code-mode-only by default, and this PR includes a concrete live harness path for the new opt-in behavior.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer label plus the new public runtime config option require human maintainer handling; no narrow automated repair is indicated.

target.title: [codex] Keep dynamic tools available in code mode
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `appServer.codeModeOnly` as an explicit Codex plugin config option instead of forcing Codex code-mode-only globally.
- Keep OpenClaw dynamic tools registered with Codex when code-mode-only is enabled, so nested tool calls still return through the app-server bridge.
- Extend unit and live gateway coverage for the code-mode-only dynamic-tool path.

Fixes #83109.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/side-question.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_CODE_MODE_ONLY=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_DEBUG=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_IMAGE_PROBE=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_MCP_PROBE=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_SUBAGENT_PROBE=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_GUARDIAN_PROBE=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_CODEX_HARNESS_MODEL=codex/gpt-5.5 pnpm test:live -- src/gateway/gateway-codex-harness.live.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --uncommitted`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Codex-runtime turns can opt into code-mode-only while OpenClaw dynamic tools remain callable through the Codex app-server tool bridge.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw gateway live harness with Codex app-server, model `codex/gpt-5.5`, and `appServer.codeModeOnly=true`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: The live gateway command listed above started a real gateway, connected a gateway client, ran two Codex turns, then asked Codex to call `sessions_list` before replying.

Evidence after fix: The live harness observed `tool` stream events for `sessions_list` with `phase=start`, then `phase=result` and `isError=false`, followed by the expected `CODEX-CODEMODE-TOOL-*` reply token.

Observed result after fix: `src/gateway/gateway-codex-harness.live.test.ts` passed in 77.96s with 1 passed and 1 skipped.

What was not tested: Full release matrix, Docker/Crabbox lanes, and non-Codex providers were not rerun for this focused Codex plugin fix.
target.author: steipete
